data.title: The U.S. SEC released its Spring 2025 regulatory agenda, covering potential rule proposals related to the issuance and sale of crypto assets.
data.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has released its Spring 2025 Regulatory Agenda, which includes potential rule proposals related to the issuance and sale of crypto-assets. The agenda aims to help clarify the regulatory framework for crypto-assets and provide greater certainty to the market. SEC Chairman Paul S. Atkins stated that a key priority during his tenure as chairman will be to clarify the rules governing the issuance, custody, and trading of crypto-assets while continuing to deter bad actors from violating the law. The report also covers a series of proposed deregulatory rules designed to reduce compliance burdens and promote capital formation, including streamlining financing and investor access to private companies. The report also discusses revising existing rules to make them more comprehensive and modernized, and addressing disclosure burdens.

data.title: Trend Research deposited another 134 million NEIRO tokens to Bybit from three addresses
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi's monitoring, Trend Research is still continuing to reduce its holdings, and has transferred a total of US$18.09 million worth of NEIRO to the exchange today. In the past 10 minutes, three addresses of Trend Research have recharged 134 million NEIRO worth US$8.24 million to Bybit.

data.title: SUN tokens completed the 46th repurchase and destruction
data.description: According to an official announcement, the 46th SUN token buyback and burn has been completed, with a total of 1,654,767 SUN tokens destroyed. The execution period is from August 7 to September 4, 2025. Since the buyback program was launched in December 2021, the total amount of SUN tokens destroyed in the ecosystem has exceeded 641 million, of which 355 million were completed through SunSwap V2 revenue and 285 million were achieved through SunPump revenue.

data.title: Nasdaq Intensifies Scrutiny of Cryptocurrency Investments by Listed Companies
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Nasdaq is increasing its scrutiny of cryptocurrency investments by its listed companies. This move comes after some companies have raised funds to purchase crypto assets, aiming to boost their stock performance. Nasdaq has expressed concern over this practice, citing potential risks of misleading investors, and has decided to enhance regulatory measures.

While specific regulatory actions have not been publicly disclosed, Nasdaq is expected to require companies to provide detailed information about their cryptocurrency investments, including the scale, strategy, and potential risks involved. Additionally, companies that frequently engage in crypto asset trading may face special examinations to ensure compliance with market standards.

This initiative reflects the growing attention of regulatory bodies on the cryptocurrency market, aiming to protect investor interests and maintain market order. Investors are advised to pay close attention to announcements and disclosures from relevant companies and carefully assess the risks associated with their investment activities.

data.title: Before the ADP release, the probability of a September rate cut by the Federal Reserve was 97.6%.
data.description: According to CME's "Fed Watch," the probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in September is 2.4%, and the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut is 97.6%. The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in October is 1.1%, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut is 46.7%, and the probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut is 52.1%.

data.title: The ADP number of "small non-farm payrolls" was lower than expected, and the US dollar index DXY fell 10 points in the short term
data.description: The U.S. ADP employment report for August showed an increase of 54,000, below market expectations of a 65,000 increase. The "small non-farm payrolls" figure was also lower than expected. The U.S. dollar index (DXY) fell 10 points in the short term, but quickly recovered and is now at 98.24. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. ADP employment figures for August were 54,000, compared to expectations of 65,000.
data.description: The US ADP employment report for August was 54,000, compared to expectations of 65,000 and the previous reading of 104,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trend Research transferred 10.05 million NEIROETH to Bybit
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, Trend Research recently transferred another 10.05 million NEIROETH (US$610,000) to Bybit following the platform's announcement to delist NEIROETH perpetual contracts. Trend Research has transferred a total of 139 million NEIROETH (US$10.64 million) to Bybit today. On-chain addresses still hold 531 million NEIROETH (US$36.23 million), representing 53.1% of the total.

data.title: Gate Alpha's top 4 gainers today: PokeSol, Pikachu, CRUISE, and reset
data.description: According to official information, the top four cryptocurrencies gaining the most on Gate Alpha today are PokeSol (1791.45%), Pikachu (595.28%), CRUISE (584.27%), and reset (537.88%). Alpha's Selected section has listed 25 on-chain tokens today, including Collector Crypt (CARDS), Brewski (Brewski), PokeSol (PokeSol), StreamerCoin (STREAMER), and Surprised Pikachu (Pikachu). Trade and earn Gate Alpha points in the app. Gate Alpha will reportedly launch a ZYRA points airdrop tomorrow, with an estimated minimum points requirement of 120-130.

data.title: Grayscale Launches Grayscale Ethereum Covered Call ETF
data.description: According to official news, Grayscale announced the launch of the Grayscale Ethereum Covered Call ETF, an Ethereum covered call option exchange-traded fund product, which aims to provide investors with a way to leverage the volatility characteristics of ETH to unlock differentiated potential income sources with a fee rate of 0.66%.

data.title: Supersonik Completes $5 Million Seed Round Led by Andreessen Horowitz
data.description: Supersonik, a company developing AI agents that can provide on-demand, real-time, multilingual software demonstrations, announced the completion of a $5 million seed round of funding led by Andreessen Horowitz. Supersonik's conversational AI agents can conduct live chats, share screens, and guide potential buyers through actual products. (Forbes)

data.title: Bit Digital: ETH holdings reach 121,252
data.description: Bit Digital announced on the X platform that its ETH holdings have reached 121,252, valued at $532.5 million, with 105,031 ETH staked and 249 ETH staking rewards already awarded.

data.title: The total amount of Bitcoin held by listed companies worldwide exceeds 1 million
data.description: BitcoinTreasuries published an article on the X platform stating that the total amount of Bitcoin held by listed companies worldwide has exceeded 1 million, reaching 1,000,442. Strategy currently ranks first, holding 636,505 Bitcoins.

data.title: Binance Alpha now lists TRADOOR
data.description: According to the official website, Binance Alpha has launched TRADOOR. Contract address: 0x9123400446a56176eb1b6be9ee5cf703e409f492

data.title: Infinity Ground receives official support from Aptos and will promote the full-link "Prompt → Move dApp" experience
data.description: Infinity Ground's Agentic IDE has been fully integrated with the Aptos network, officially supporting the development of decentralized applications (dApps) based on the Move language ecosystem and receiving official support from Aptos. Together, they will enable developers to rapidly generate, refine, and deploy Move contracts and application prototypes using natural language within an intelligent development environment. Leveraging Aptos' advantages in high performance, public chain security, and stability, users can enjoy an efficient and seamless AI-driven development experience within the Infinity Agentic IDE, whether building games, social networks, or DeFi applications. As the Vibe Coding infrastructure for Web 3, Infinity Ground is committed to lowering the barrier to entry for application development, enabling anyone to develop and deploy dApps on-chain using natural language. Infinity Ground already offers full support for the EVM system, and this official collaboration with Aptos will further help developers and users build, distribute, and utilize applications within the MoveVM system, accelerating the scale-up of Web 3 applications.

data.title: RWA Layer2 Zyra Network will soon open participation channels
data.description: Official news: Zyra, a Layer 2 project focused on RWA and Depository (Debit Card) platforms, will open its network to early community members at 8:00 PM (UTC+8) on September 4th. According to the official introduction, Zyra is committed to building an on-chain credit infrastructure driven by ordinary users, focusing on on-chain access for high-yield debt, structured assets, and real-world returns. The project utilizes a multi-node verification architecture and incorporates an intelligent credit scoring mechanism, aiming to provide more robust asset support for Web 3 finance.

data.title: Digital asset management company Bitwise has launched five crypto ETPs in Switzerland, covering BTC, ETH, XRP, SOL, etc.
data.description: Digital asset management company Bitwise has announced the listing of five cryptocurrency ETPs on the Six Swiss Exchange. These include the Bitwise Core Bitcoin ETP, the Bitwise Ethereum Staking ETP, the Bitwise Solana Staking ETP, the Bitwise Physical XRP ETP, and the Bitwise MSCI Digital Assets Select 20 ETP. This brings the total number of cryptocurrency ETPs Bitwise has listed on the Six Swiss Exchange to ten. (Globenewswire)

data.title: BlackRock deposited 33,884 ETH to Coinbase Prime 2 hours ago
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 2 hours ago, BlackRock deposited 33,884 ETH worth $148.6 million to Coinbase Prime.

data.title: DDC Enterprise's semi-annual results report: Reaffirms its target Bitcoin holdings of 10,000 this year, with a return of 1,798% to date.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed DDC Enterprise Limited released its unaudited six-month financial results for the period ending June 30, 2025. The results indicate that since its initial Bitcoin purchase in late May, its holdings reached 1,008 as of the end of August, with a return of 1,798% year-to-date and a current profit of $3.8 million. The company also reiterated its target of 10,000 Bitcoin holdings for the year, aiming to become one of the top three Bitcoin asset managers globally within three years. (Businesswire)

data.title: Bitget's on-chain trading volume hit a new high, exceeding $31 million in a single day.
data.description: Bitget's on-chain trading sector saw $31 million in trading volume yesterday, a record high. Third-party data indicates that Binance Alpha's daily trading volume during the same period was approximately $77.5 million, accounting for approximately 40% of its average daily trading volume. Bitget's on-chain trading sector reportedly launched over 100 US stock tokens supported by Ondo yesterday, including stocks of well-known companies such as Apple, Tesla, Microsoft, Amazon, and Nvidia, as well as major index funds. Bitget also supports direct on-chain trading of US stocks on centralized exchanges using USDC.
